# Planning Packet

<!-- READ-ONLY TEMPLATE. Do NOT edit this file during a task. -->
<!-- The planner READS this schema and EMITS a filled copy in its response output. -->
<!-- Optional persistence for medium/large tasks: write the filled copy to `.ai/plans/<YYYY-MM-DD>-<slug>.md` (new file, never overwrite). -->
<!-- Every field must earn its inclusion. -->

Task ID: <!-- short slug, e.g. fix-login-redirect -->
Task: <!-- one sentence -->
Size: <!-- trivial | small | medium | large -->
Desired outcome: <!-- observable result, not implementation detail -->
Current behavior: <!-- what happens now, if applicable -->
Relevant files: <!-- exact paths, max 10. If >10, decompose the task. -->
Likely subsystem: <!-- e.g. auth, payments, CLI parser -->
Constraints: <!-- hard limits: do-not-touch zones, API contracts, perf budgets -->
Acceptance criteria: <!-- testable conditions, one per line -->
Tests to add: <!-- one test per acceptance criterion where feasible. Format: `- <test name or path::case> — verifies <acceptance criterion>`. Required when Risk level is `elevated` OR Size is `medium`/`large`. May be `none` for trivial / low-risk small changes, but state why (e.g. "config-only change, manual smoke test in Validation"). -->
Risks: <!-- what could go wrong, one per line -->
Risk level: <!-- low | elevated. elevated if any path in `Relevant files` overlaps `.ai/project.yaml` boundaries.risky_areas / security_sensitive / migration_sensitive. elevated forces review regardless of Size. -->
Risk matches: <!-- list each overlapping path with the boundary list it matched, or "none" -->
Smallest safe plan: <!-- 2-5 sentences max -->
Delegable execution packet(s): <!-- number of packets and brief scope of each -->
Escalation trigger: <!-- condition under which executor must stop -->
Memory candidates: <!-- operational facts discovered during planning worth persisting. Use format `- YYYY-MM-DD [topic] fact`. One per line. -->
